title: Vaessen Creative Satin Ribbon, Milk Chocolate, 6mm x 10m, Elegant Shine for Card Making, Scrapbooks, Gift Wrapping and Other Craft Projects, 6 mm, Light Blue
features: Double-sided satin sheen – The ribbon has a shiny and smooth surface on both sides for a professional and symmetrical effect. Soft and silky material that can be used to make different shapes

Stunning colours – with 24 bright colours to choose from, you’ll certainly find a fitting match for any project and season. From bold primary colours that are perfect for holiday decorations to sweet pastels for baby showers

Perfect for craft projects – ribbons are very adaptable and can be used in just about any craft project. Use them to make ribbon wreaths and baby toys or weave a line of ribbon through a card to add a lovely effect. Scrap bookers can use ribbon to decorate a cover, FRAME a picture or as a bookmark. Ribbons are great to have on hand in your craft room

Well-designed packaging – durable Flat round cardboard spool that you can hang up or stack with other colours for easy storage. Special slots on either side of the spool to place the end of the ribbon after use Ensure the ribbon can be wound up nice and tidy
Measurements – Each pack contains 1 spool of ribbon, measuring 6 mm wide by 10 metres long. The ribbon is easy to cut with scissors so can be cut to any preferred length
description: From the manufacturer Vaessen Creative Satin Ribbon 6 mm x 10 m Pastel Blue Satin ribbon is a beautiful base ribbon to decorate your craft creations or make pretty bows on gifts. The ribbon is soft and smooth and has a double-sided glossy finish with embroidered edges. This makes it ideal for creating cards or decorating your scrapbooking pages. You can also beautify baskets, tie up gift bags and decorate cakes yourself. You can easily cut the satin ribbon with sharp or serrated scissors without fraying. The ribbon is wound on a spool that you can easily hang or stack. On each side of the spool there is a slot through which the end of the ribbon can be pulled through, so the ribbon can be stored neatly rolled up.
